import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let grade = if n >= 90
      "A"
    else if n >= 75
      "B"
    else if n >= 60
      "C"
    else
      "F"
    end
    println(grade)
  when None
    println("F")
  end
end
